failure_signature: session: fix data race in the LazyTxn.LockKeys
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: session: fix data race in the LazyTxn.LockKeys.
